contracts.name: CSVSeal
contracts.note: Merged lock + mint contract. Redeploy with: forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url $SEPOLIA_RPC_URL --private-key $DEPLOYER_KEY --broadcast

solana.note: TRM-ROLLOUT-001: RFC-0012 thin-registry csv_seal deployed to Solana devnet 2026-07-06 (deployed with --max-len = program size, so upgrades to a larger binary need a new buffer). program_id is the §9.2 destinationContract. Verifier registry PDA ["verifier_registry"] SEEDED 2026-07-06 via initialize_verifier_registry (tx 3ukSDFReXbFcagJG2egRiE1za7akv56UGCh8NqvbSSvWGzKdLJfRSdr6RsWZA6FSJSoLTrBCgCM8PnQCizG3t6YW): 1 verifier, threshold 1, authority EySRKYtj…. MINT ENABLED once the runtime holds the matching CSV_MINT_VERIFIER_KEY.

sui.note: TRM-ROLLOUT-001: RFC-0012 thin-registry csv_seal published to Sui testnet 2026-07-05. registry_id is the shared Registry object (§9.2 destinationContract); the Sui adapter resolves it via get_sui_registry_id. Verifier set seeded/repaired 2026-07-10: add_verifier tx 9hYRi7hgbLUZgFn6oTrcaPsuTYxrtRYmdYLLwnmZfcnv; set_threshold=1 tx EunWBWzqvMztHUbnCqxVteEBkWsiCEZwHoF1morMBxMW. MINT ENABLED when the runtime holds the matching CSV_MINT_VERIFIER_KEY.

aptos.note: TRM-ROLLOUT-001: RFC-0012 thin-registry csv_seal::CSVSeal deployed to Aptos testnet 2026-07-06 under a fresh account (module_address = @csv_seal = §9.2 destinationContract). Account (not object) deployment is required: init_mint_authority/init_registry assert signer == @csv_seal and store resources there, which an object address cannot sign. Initialized: initialize_module, init_registry (replay tables), init_mint_authority (verifier seeded, threshold 1, tx 0x2e287b0e1e161da79c160dd76606924a34619439b33a5144b821d462f1602814). The earlier object deployment 0x26f43311… is abandoned (uninitializable). MINT ENABLED once the runtime holds the matching CSV_MINT_VERIFIER_KEY.
